chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision No. D – 26 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on MA No.712/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 19.11.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None has appeared on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation received; same was the position on the last two consecutive dates of hearing. The continuous absence on the part of the applicant and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Criminal Revision Application has been served or they have lost interest to proceed with the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
